title: Dungeons Artifacts
description: A datapack that adds the artifacts of Minecaft Dungeon
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b67f873cc7d4b4dcecdb91595eb0c0b93f8f120.jpeg) ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a1954f14e2e1d4816014bddff2f6e705d10158.png) If you’re a **Minecraft** fan and like the idea of adding a touch of adventure and strategy to your game, then our **Data Pack / Mod** that brings the artifacts from **Minecraft Dungeons** into the world of Minecraft is for you! These artifacts not only add an extra dimension to your gaming experience, but also offer new ways to tackle your enemies. Prepare your resources, collect artifacts and face more exciting challenges than ever before, with a cooldown system that keeps the gameplay balanced and fun! ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da0442fcc8f2d77453f4c79a2bfcb0c84b1c0fc.png) Currently, artifacts can be obtained by **command** for easy experimentation. Each artifact has a **similar** **cooldown** to that of Minecraft Dungeons, but slightly adapted to be balanced in Minecraft. The harder the level of play (difficulty), the longer the ability recharge time will be, leading to a continuous challenge to balance the strategic use of artifacts. ## Available Artifacts ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/977b033e6ba5af5f9f836a63aeaf2162f175b7fc.png) Each artifact is suitable for different styles of play: those who love to attack from the front, those who prefer to protect themselves and those who seek tactics in the escape and recovery phases. ## How to get the artifacts To get the artifacts, use the command: ``` /function diesse:mcda/a_give/... ``` Typing this command in the chat will appears all the available artifacts in this pack. # Website If you have any questions, need assistance, or simply want to share your thoughts or feedback, feel free to reach out. We're always here to help and would love to hear from you – whether you're looking for answers, suggestions, or just want to let us know how we're doing.
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a21d1c453796757f5e27ce9b94e648664755964_0.webp)![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb8b289a15c3eee79a8540f279e3486f6e7e22fc.png) ## Other links [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1939f49bcb6e53e1f7c526c007eeb1be4a69aeb2.png)‎](https://it.fiverr.com/diesse2007) [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/169f5456fb11650701a2af7890b911e62386388e_0.webp)‎](https://x.com/dskianto) [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c38479243db42f491e3674a0ccda6de2c934b7f.png)‎](https://wanmine.net/)
